visa_types.name: National Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- National Application form Short stay English
- National Application form Short stay Slovakia
- For more information: National Visa | Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Tel Aviv (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/telaviv-en/services/national_visa)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > pse > en > Table:National Visa   > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- The above-mentioned Visa Fee & VFS Service Fee is to be paid in Cash in Israeli Shekels (ILS) only.
- The application center will follow the exchange rate provided by the embassy which is subject to change without notice.
- VFS Service fee is inclusive of VAT as per the applicable laws in Palestine
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 35 -40 days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
- National Application form Short stay English
- National Application form Short stay Slovakia
To Download a Form:
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, and all the applicable fee please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/telaviv-en/services/national_visa#15752_ksia_inpage_nav_5).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, and all the applicable fee please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/telaviv-en/services/national_visa#15752_ksia_inpage_nav_5).

## Visa Fees

[svk > pse > en > Table:National Visa   > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- The above-mentioned Visa Fee & VFS Service Fee is to be paid in Cash in Israeli Shekels (ILS) only.
- The application center will follow the exchange rate provided by the embassy which is subject to change without notice.
- VFS Service fee is inclusive of VAT as per the applicable laws in Palestine
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- National Application form Short stay English
- National Application form Short stay Slovakia
- For more information: National Visa | Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Tel Aviv (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/telaviv-en/services/national_visa)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 35 -40 days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
- National Application form Short stay English
- National Application form Short stay Slovakia
To Download a Form:
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.

## Visa Fees

[svk > pse > en > Table:Visiting Family and Friends > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- The above-mentioned Visa Fee & VFS Service Fee is to be paid in Cash in Israeli Shekels (ILS) only.
- The application center will follow the exchange rate provided by the embassy which is subject to change without notice.
- VFS Service fee is inclusive of VAT as per the applicable laws in Palestine
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15- 18 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[svk > pse > en > Table:Business/Conference > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- The above-mentioned Visa Fee & VFS Service Fee is to be paid in Cash in Israeli Shekels (ILS) only.
- The application center will follow the exchange rate provided by the embassy which is subject to change without notice.
- VFS Service fee is inclusive of VAT as per the applicable laws in Palestine
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15- 18 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms

- Select Save Target As from the list

- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15- 18 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
